    "Coupling gap is out of specification during active shaft alignment"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop alignment procedure",
    "Adjust axial spacing of the machines to bring the coupling gap within specified tolerances before proceeding with angular and parallel alignment"

  "rationale": "According to API 686 and standard laser alignment procedures, the coupling gap (axial spacing) must be set and verified within tolerance before final angular and parallel alignment steps are completed. Proceeding with an out-of-spec gap violates the correct sequence and can cause equipment damage or incorrect readings.",

  ]
